perFrameCode: // this is a great way to respond to beats:
// once you get one, let it decay at a constant rate!!
// custom beat detection code: (fps-independent; quiet songs don't freak out)
min_att    = 2.5;               // lower # = quieter songs can declare beats
decay_to   = 0.8;               // lower # = more hasty to declare a beat
decay_rate = pow(0.9980, fps);  // lower # = more hasty to declare a beat
perFrameInitCode: // determines the cell sizes: (see per-vertex eqs)
perPixelCode: // this creates squares of a certain size, in pixels,
// no matter what the size of the screen, or its aspect ratio:
